title: Hollow Knight light HUD
description: Simple resourcepack which contains small HUD changes, trying to mimic the UI from Hollow Knight.
body:
Right now only features changes for the icons.png, which includes health, armor, hunger and similar HUD elements, including the cursor. Also, the poison effect icon looks like the infection. 

This was actually made for me and my friend to use in our server with [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hollow-knight-origin), which is worth checking out.

No updates are expected, but I would appreciate some ideas and fixes.
